headline: Rothschild Upgrades Colgate-Palmolive (CL) to Buy from Neutral
summary: Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) is one of the 8 Best Counter Cyclical Stocks to Buy Right Now. On April 21, 2026, Rothschild & Co Redburn upgraded Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) to Buy from Neutral and raised its price target to $100 from $93.
